verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nang leh Aaron, Nadab, Abihu leh Israel upate sung pan sawmsagih tawh keima kiangah hong paito un la, a gamla panin kunin hong bia un
Topa' nai-ah Moses bek hong pai ding hi. A dangte a nai-ah hong pailo ding a, mihonte in mual ciangdong hong nehlo ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Moses hong pai-in Topa' thugente khempeuh leh biakna ngeinate khempeuh mite kiangah a gen hi. Mi khempeuh in aw kikhatin dawng uh a, “ Topa' gensa thute khempeuh ka hih ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Moses in Topa' thugente khempeuh a gelh hi. Zingsangin amah tho baih a, mual bulah biakna tau khat lamin, Israel minam sawmlenihte tawh kituakin khuam sawmlenih a phut hi
Amah in Israel mi tangvalte sawlin, tuate in meihal biakna leh thunuama biakna bawngtalte Topa' tungah pia uh hi
Moses in a sisan kimkhat la-in, kuangte sungah koih a, sisan kimkhat biakna tau tungah a theh hi
Tua ciangin amah in thuciamna laibu la-in, mite' zakin tua laibu a sim hi. Amaute in, “ Topa' gensa khempeuh kote in ka hih ding uh a, kote ka thumang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses in sisan la-in mite' tungah theh a, “Hih thute khempeuh tawh kizui-in Topa in note tawh a bawlsa thuciamna sisan en un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses leh Aaron, Nadab, Abihu leh Israel upate sung pan sawmsagih paito uh a
amaute in Israel Pasian mu uh hi. Ama khe nuai-ah a siangthona van meel tawh a kibang, sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl suangphahpek bangpian om hi
Amah in Israel mi makaite gimna ngahsaklo hi. Amaute in Pasian mu uh a, tua ciangin an ne-in tui dawn uh hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keima kiang mualtungah hong paito in la, tua lai-ah ngak in. Amaute a kihilhna dingin keima gelhsa, thukham leh thupiakna tawh, suangpek nang tungah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin ama nasempa Joshua tawh Moses kithawi uh a, Pasian' mual tungah paito uh hi
Amah in upate kiangah, “Note' kiangah kong paikik matengun hih lai-ah kote hong ngak un. En un, note tawh Aaron leh Hur om hi. Thu nei peuhpeuh amaute' kiangah paisak un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin mualtungah Moses paito a, meii in mual a tuam hi
Topa' minthan'na vang pen Sinai Mual tungah kinga a, meii in ni guk sung tua mual a tuam hi. A ni sagih ni-in amah in meii lak panin Moses a sam hi
Tu-in Topa' vangliatna vang pen Israel mite' muhna-ah mualvum dawn a kangtum meikuang tawh kibang hi
Meii sungah Moses tum a, mualtungah paito hi. Moses sun sawmli leh zan sawmli sung mualtungah a om hi.
